summary: Iteration 143: Verified sidebar restructure (Intelligence shows only 5 direct links), back button visibility, Advisor page state, and code review of decision card UX components. Brain is in syncing state so live decision cards could not be verified visually, but code review confirms all required elements are implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: Fixed banner intercepts pointer events for Back button when banner is visible
ui_bugs.note: Back button is clickable once banner is dismissed or scrolled past

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar Intelligence section correctly shows only 5 direct links: BIQc Overview, Market & Positioning, Operations, Revenue, Risk
Old child links (Boardroom, Soundboard) correctly removed from sidebar navigation
Back button [data-testid='page-back-button'] is present and visible at position x=280, y=80 in navigation row

Decision card structure in AdvisorWatchtower.js includes all required UX elements per code review: View full context toggle (line 1854), Signal block with info icon (lines 1858-1873), Why now (line 1875), Action now (line 1876), SoundBoard chat button (lines 1884-1886), More actions dropdown (lines 1893-1913), If ignored section (line 1933), Inline Ignore button (lines 1938-1946), 30/60/90 outlook (lines 1914-1920)
Assign owner action correctly routes to /actions with advisorAssignment state (lines 1355-1370)
ActionsPage.js correctly renders advisor handoff card when advisorAssignment state is passed (lines 177-197)
DelegateActionModal.jsx correctly implements delegation workflow with provider selection, assignee inputs, and calendar event option

success_rate.frontend: 100% (sidebar structure verified, back button visible, Advisor page loads)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 143 verified sidebar restructure and Advisor card UX implementation. Brain was in syncing state during testing so live decision cards could not be visually verified, but code review confirms all required elements are properly implemented. Decision cards include: View full context toggle, Signal block with info icon, Why now, Action now, SoundBoard chat, More actions dropdown (with add-to-calendar, assign-owner, mark-actioned options), If ignored with inline Ignore button, and 30/60/90 outlook. Minor issue: DailyBriefBanner can intercept back button clicks when visible.
